name: Hiroko Kita
description:
Gender: Male
Pronouns: He/him
Sexuality: Bisexual with a leniency towards guys.

Age: 16-22 depending on RP
Height: 5’8 1⁄2 
Skin Tone: Pale
----------------------
Quirk: Clock pause. 
Quirk information: The quirk ‘Clock Pause’ can be used to slow down time, or even to stop it for a small amount of time. The user can use this on specific people. The suer can slow down people or stop their time for a bit while he/she is going normally. They can travel around while the quirk is being used and can choose who they use it on and who is excluded from a number of people.
Quirk drawbacks: The user stops growing from the age of 14. If quirk is overused then user will get severe headaches, nose bleeding, sometimes even ear bleeding, and can cause them to become dehydrated. 
Likes:
Raiden enjoys drawing and creating tattoos, anything that is involved with art, he will always lean towards that option. He has a soft spot for sushi, even though he rarely eats it and also a spot for sweet foods.
Dislikes:
Raiden dislikes rude and self involved people, deep bodies of water, and spicy foods. 
Looks from age of 16-18:
Raiden Hatashi has dyed red hair with his natural black roots coming in. He has curtain bangs that he sometimes allows to fall over his eyes but majority of the time he keeps them beside his eyes. His hair is able to be put up in a short ponytail but the curtain bangs would be left out due to them not being able to reach.
Looks from age of 18+ same thing as before but accessories etc)
Raiden Hatashi has a tongue piercing, septum piercing, left eyebrow piercing, A small skull tattoo on the left side lower quadrant. He has a fire tattoo on his right shoulder that is medium.
Raiden Hatashi is a thin male with light abs and slightly muscular (very slightly)
Power level: 7/10
Quirk control: 9/10
Body Strength: 7/10
Strength with Quirk: 9/10
